scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,inngest,stripe -c blue,magenta,green "node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e .env -- tsx watch src/index.ts" "inngest-cli dev" "pnpm run dev:stripe-webhook"
scripts.dev:stripe-webhook: node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e .env -- sh -c 'if [ -z "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" ]; then echo "[stripe] STRIPE_SECRET_KEY missing; skipping webhook listener"; exit 0; fi; if [ -z "$STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET" ]; then echo "[stripe] STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET missing; run stripe listen once and copy the local whsec into apps/api/.env"; exit 0; fi; if ! command -v stripe >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[stripe] Stripe CLI missing; skipping webhook listener"; exit 0; fi; STRIPE_API_KEY="$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" stripe listen --events checkout.session.completed,checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded,checkout.session.async_payment_failed,invoice.paid,invoice.payment_failed,customer.subscription.deleted --forward-to localhost:3002/webhooks/stripe 2>&1 | sed -E "s/whsec_[A-Za-z0-9_]+/whsec_***REDACTED***/g"'
